problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Stem. Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
